name: Barvarian Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the potatoes into 1/4-inch thick slices.
2. Use either homemade or commercial chicken broth for cooking the potatoes.
3. Boil the potatoes in the broth with 1/4 teaspoon salt for 5 to 8 minutes, until tender.
4. Drain the potatoes and toss them with vegetable oil and chopped onions.
5. Dissolve the remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt and sugar in lemon juice.
6. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
7. Marinate the salad for 1 to 2 hours before serving.
8. Serve the salad at room temperature.
